name: mal-mcp
description: Search and browse MyAnimeList anime/manga and manage your personal list.
long_description: MCP server for MyAnimeList. Reads (search, details, rankings, seasons, characters, recommendations, reviews, public profiles) are served via the public Jikan API and require no credentials. Personal-list tools (read/update/delete your own anime & manga list) use the official MyAnimeList API and require a user token; without one they return an actionable error. Works with any MCP client.

tools.name: search_anime
tools.description: Search anime by keyword.

tools.name: search_manga
tools.description: Search manga by keyword.

tools.name: get_anime
tools.description: Get full details for one anime by id.

tools.name: get_manga
tools.description: Get full details for one manga by id.

tools.name: get_anime_characters
tools.description: List an anime's characters and voice actors.

tools.name: get_anime_recommendations
tools.description: Community recommendations for an anime.

tools.name: get_anime_reviews
tools.description: User reviews for an anime.

tools.name: get_top_anime
tools.description: Ranked/top anime, with optional filters.

tools.name: get_top_manga
tools.description: Ranked/top manga, with optional filters.

tools.name: get_seasonal_anime
tools.description: Anime for a given (or current) season.

tools.name: get_anime_schedule
tools.description: Broadcast schedule, optionally by weekday.

tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: A public user's profile and statistics.

tools.name: get_user_favorites
tools.description: A public user's favorite anime/manga/characters/people.

tools.name: get_my_user_info
tools.description: The authenticated user's profile (requires token).

tools.name: get_my_anime_list
tools.description: The authenticated user's anime list (requires token).

tools.name: get_my_manga_list
tools.description: The authenticated user's manga list (requires token).

tools.name: update_my_anime_status
tools.description: Add/update an anime on your list (requires token).

tools.name: update_my_manga_status
tools.description: Add/update a manga on your list (requires token).

tools.name: delete_my_anime_list_item
tools.description: Remove an anime from your list (requires token).

tools.name: delete_my_manga_list_item
tools.description: Remove a manga from your list (requires token).

mal_client_id.title: MyAnimeList Client ID
mal_client_id.description: For personal-list tools. From your app at myanimelist.net/apiconfig. See docs/auth.md.

mal_client_secret.title: MyAnimeList Client Secret
mal_client_secret.description: For personal-list tools. From your app at myanimelist.net/apiconfig. See docs/auth.md.

mal_refresh_token.title: MyAnimeList Refresh Token
mal_refresh_token.description: For personal-list tools. From the one-time OAuth in docs/auth.md. Enables silent auto-refresh.

mal_access_token.title: MyAnimeList Access Token (advanced)
mal_access_token.description: Optional. Standalone token; works ~30 days with no refresh. Usually leave blank and set the three above.
